title: Oil rises above $115 and Asia stocks slide as Iran war escalates
description: It comes after Iran-backed Houthi rebels in Yemen joined the conflict by striking Israel over the weekend.
content:
Global oil prices jumped and stocks fell sharply on Monday morning in Asia as the US-Israel war with Iran escalates.
The price of Brent crude rose by more than 3% to above $115 (£86.77) a barrel, while US-traded oil climbed to $103 after gaining arou... [414 chars]

title: Trump says he is considering seizing Iran's Kharg Island, as oil price rises
description: In an interview with the Financial Times, the US president says he wants to "take" Iran's oil but adds a deal could be reached "fairly quickly".
content:
Saudi Arabia says it intercepted multiple missiles
Saudi Arabia's ministry of defence says it detected and intercepted five ballistic missiles heading towards its eastern region.

title: Artemis II: Why is Nasa sending people back to the Moon?
description: From a race with China to lunar discoveries, the US is investing time, effort and money to head to the Moon - and beyond.
content:
In just a few days Nasa is planning to launch the Artemis II mission, sending four astronauts on their way to the Moon.
Their voyage around our nearest neighbour will pave the way for a lunar landing and, eventually, a Moon base.
Nasa's Artemis progr... [4342 chars]

title: Babies: Harry Potter star hopes his TV drama Babies will break pregnancy loss silence
description: The BBC drama follows a couple in their 30s trying for a baby and navigating the complexities of pregnancy loss.
content:
"If it makes one person able to talk about pregnancy loss when they previously couldn't, I think the show will have been a success," says Paapa Essiedu.
For the British actor that is the measure of impact for Babies - a series that places difficult, ... [4810 chars]

title: Why Chinese tech companies are racing to set up in Hong Kong
description: Mainland firms are using the territory to test products and as a springboard for global expansion.
content:
In a hotel lobby on Hong Kong Island, a delivery robot pauses outside one of the lifts as the doors open, and a guest steps out. The robot waits, and then rolls neatly inside.
The move looks simple, but it isn't. To work in the busy hotel, owned by a... [3623 chars]
